title: ChatFlow - WhatsApp-style messaging application frontend implementation

requirements.summary: Implement Internet Identity authentication with secure session management
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register and login using Internet Identity
Support for passkeys and social login (Google, Apple, Microsoft)
Secure session management with logout functionality
Users remain authenticated across page refreshes

file_operations.description: Create login/logout button component using the authorization component's useInternetIdentity hook with proper state management and error handling for authentication flows
Add authentication state check and render LoginButton when user is not authenticated, ensuring all application data is only accessible after login

requirements.summary: Create user profile system with avatar upload, status message, username display, and profile editing
acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload and change their profile avatar image
Users can set and update a text status message
Profile displays username clearly
Profile page shows all user information with edit functionality

file_operations.description: Create custom hook wrapping getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile backend methods using react-query, implementing proper loading states and following the authorization component's pattern to prevent profile setup modal flash. Use the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob class for avatar handling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create modal dialog for first-time profile setup prompting for username, status message, and optional avatar upload using blob-storage ExternalBlob.fromBytes for avatar handling. Show only when user is authenticated and has no profile. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create modal for editing existing user profile allowing username, status, and avatar changes using blob-storage ExternalBlob for avatar handling with upload progress tracking via withUploadProgress. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Integrate ProfileSetupModal to show when authenticated user has no profile, ensuring proper conditional rendering based on authentication and profile state from useUserProfile hook

requirements.summary: Build one-to-one private messaging system with scrollable chat history, timestamps, auto-scroll, and username search for new chats
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send and receive private messages to other users
Chat history displays all messages in chronological order
Each message shows timestamp
Chat window auto-scrolls to show latest message
Users can initiate new chats by searching for usernames
Message history persists across sessions

file_operations.description: Create hook wrapping getConversations backend method using react-query to fetch all user conversations with caching and automatic refetch support
Create hook wrapping getChatHistory backend method using react-query to fetch messages for a specific chat with proper dependency on chatId parameter
Create mutation hook wrapping sendMessage backend method using react-query mutations with optimistic updates and query invalidation
Create hook wrapping searchUserByUsername backend method to enable username-based user search for initiating new conversations
Create mutation hook wrapping createChat backend method to handle creation of new one-to-one and group conversations

Create main chat window component displaying scrollable message list with timestamps, message bubbles styled differently for sent vs received messages, auto-scroll to bottom on new messages using useRef and useEffect
Create message input component with text area and send button, integrating useSendMessage hook for message submission
Create modal for initiating new chats with username search input using useSearchUser hook and createChat functionality for starting one-to-one conversations
Create message bubble component displaying message content, sender name, timestamp, and edit/delete indicators with WhatsApp-style rounded bubbles and color differentiation

requirements.summary: Implement contact list sidebar with conversation previews, unread counters, and delete conversation option
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar displays list of all user conversations
Each contact shows preview of last message sent/received
Unread message count badge appears on conversations with new messages
Users can delete entire conversations
Clicking a contact opens that conversation in main chat window

file_operations.description: Create mutation hook wrapping deleteConversation backend method with optimistic updates and conversation list invalidation

Create sidebar component displaying all conversations using useConversations hook, showing last message preview, unread badge counts, and delete buttons for each conversation with click handlers to select active chat

Create individual conversation list item component showing contact/group name, avatar, last message preview, timestamp, unread count badge, and delete icon with proper styling for active/inactive states
Create hook to calculate unread message counts per conversation by comparing message timestamps with user's last read timestamp

requirements.summary: Create group chat functionality with creation, member management, group settings, admin roles, and sender name display
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create new group chats and set group name
Group creator becomes admin automatically
Admin can add and remove members from group
Groups support custom avatar upload
Each message in group clearly shows who sent it
Admin role is visible and can be transferred
Group conversations appear in contact list sidebar

file_operations.description: Create hooks wrapping addGroupMember, removeGroupMember, assignGroupAdmin, and updateGroupSettings backend methods using react-query mutations for group management operations

Create modal for group chat creation with group name input, member selection via username search, and optional group avatar upload using blob-storage ExternalBlob with upload progress tracking. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create modal for editing group settings including name, avatar, member list with add/remove controls, and admin role management, accessible only to group admins using blob-storage ExternalBlob for avatar handling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Enhance MessageBubble to display sender username for group messages by fetching sender's UserProfile and showing their username above message content

Update ConversationItem to handle group chat display showing group name, group avatar using blob-storage ExternalBlob.getDirectURL for image rendering, and group-specific indicators. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement image and file upload system with preview, download, and supported file types
acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload and send image files in chats
Users can upload and send document files (PDF, DOC, etc.)
Images display as previews directly in chat bubbles
Files show with download button and filename
Attachments persist and remain downloadable
File size limits are enforced appropriately

file_operations.description: Create file upload button component with file input handling for images (JPG, PNG) and documents (PDF, DOC) using blob-storage ExternalBlob.fromBytes for file conversion and withUploadProgress for progress tracking. Include file size validation before upload. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Integrate FileUploadButton into message input area allowing users to attach files to messages with visual feedback during upload

Enhance MessageBubble to render image attachments as inline previews using blob-storage ExternalBlob.getDirectURL for streaming and caching, and document attachments with download buttons. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create image preview component for displaying uploaded images within chat bubbles using blob-storage ExternalBlob.getDirectURL to leverage streaming and caching. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create file attachment component showing file name, size, and download button using blob-storage ExternalBlob.getBytes for download functionality. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add message editing and deletion features with 5-minute time limit and delete for everyone option
acceptanceCriteria: Users can edit their own messages within 5 minutes
Users can delete their own messages within 5 minutes
Delete option includes 'delete for everyone' removing message from all participants
Edited messages show 'edited' indicator
After 5 minutes, edit and delete options are disabled

file_operations.description: Create mutation hooks wrapping editMessage and deleteMessage backend methods with proper timestamp validation for 5-minute rule enforcement and query invalidation after operations

Create message actions menu component showing edit and delete options, visible only for user's own messages within 5 minutes of sending, using timestamp comparison with current time. Include 'delete for everyone' checkbox in delete confirmation dialog

Integrate MessageActions menu into MessageBubble with owner verification using authorization component's identity comparison pattern, showing edit/delete options only for user's own messages. Display 'edited' indicator when message.isEdited is true
Create modal for editing message content with text input pre-filled with existing content and save/cancel buttons using useMessageOperations hook

requirements.summary: Implement search functionality within conversations to find specific messages
acceptanceCriteria: Search input field appears in chat header
Search filters messages by text content in real-time
Search results highlight matching messages
Search works across entire conversation history

file_operations.description: Create hook wrapping searchMessages backend method using react-query with debounced search input to avoid excessive backend calls
Create chat header component displaying conversation name, avatar, and search input field using useMessageSearch hook with real-time filtering as user types
Integrate ChatHeader into ChatWindow and implement search result highlighting by filtering displayed messages based on search results with visual indicators for matched messages

requirements.summary: Integrate emoji picker component for inserting emojis into messages
acceptanceCriteria: Emoji picker button appears in message input area
Clicking button opens emoji selection panel
Users can browse and select emojis
Selected emoji inserts at cursor position in message input
Emojis render correctly in sent messages

file_operations.description: Add emoji-picker-react package dependency for emoji selection functionality
Create emoji picker wrapper component using emoji-picker-react library with button trigger and popover panel for emoji selection
Integrate EmojiPicker component into message input area with callback to insert selected emoji at cursor position in text area, maintaining cursor position and focus

requirements.summary: Create WhatsApp-inspired responsive UI with sidebar, rounded message bubbles, dark/light mode, green theme, and smooth animations
acceptanceCriteria: Layout includes left sidebar with chat list and main chat window area
Message bubbles are rounded with distinct colors for sent vs received messages
Green accent color applied consistently throughout UI (similar to WhatsApp)
Dark mode and light mode toggle button functional
All UI elements respect current theme (dark/light)
Layout adapts responsively for mobile screens and desktop screens
Smooth transitions and animations on interactions
Minimalist, clean design with soft color palette

file_operations.description: Configure Tailwind theme with WhatsApp-inspired green accent colors (#25D366 for primary green), soft color palette for light/dark modes, custom rounded message bubble utilities, and responsive breakpoints for mobile/desktop layouts

Add global CSS variables for theme colors supporting dark/light mode, smooth transition classes for animations, and base styling for message bubbles with distinct sent/received colors using green accent
Create custom hook for managing dark/light theme state with localStorage persistence and CSS class toggling on document root element
Create theme toggle button component with sun/moon icons using useTheme hook to switch between dark and light modes

Create main layout component with two-column responsive design: left sidebar for conversation list and right main area for chat window, using CSS Grid or Flexbox with mobile breakpoint switching to single column with slide-out sidebar

Wrap application content in Layout component integrating sidebar (ConversationList) and main chat area (ChatWindow), add ThemeToggle button to app header, and ensure all components respect theme context

requirements.summary: Build admin panel showing user/message counts and user account management
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel route accessible only to admin users
Dashboard displays total number of registered users
Dashboard displays total number of messages sent
Admin can view list of all users
Admin can disable user accounts preventing their login
Admin can re-enable disabled accounts
Non-admin users cannot access admin panel

file_operations.description: Create hooks wrapping getTotalUserCount, getTotalMessageCount, and isCallerAdmin backend methods using react-query for admin statistics
Create mutation hooks wrapping disableUser and enableUser backend methods for admin user account management with proper query invalidation

Create admin panel page component displaying total user count, total message count, and user management table with enable/disable controls using useAdminStats and useUserManagement hooks. Include admin-only access guard using isCallerAdmin check with unauthorized redirect
Create protected route wrapper component that verifies admin status using isCallerAdmin backend method before rendering admin-only components, redirecting unauthorized users to main app
Add route for admin panel at /admin path wrapped in AdminRoute guard component with navigation link visible only to admin users after authentication

requirements.summary: Implement auto-refresh polling mechanism checking for new messages every 3-5 seconds
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend automatically polls backend for new messages every 3-5 seconds
New messages appear in chat without user action
Polling occurs only when chat is open and user is active
Unread message counters update automatically
Last message previews in sidebar refresh automatically
Polling stops when user logs out or closes app

file_operations.description: Configure react-query to automatically refetch conversations every 4 seconds using refetchInterval option, with refetchIntervalInBackground set to false to pause polling when tab is inactive

Configure react-query to automatically refetch chat history every 4 seconds using refetchInterval option, enabled only when chat is open and user is authenticated, with refetchIntervalInBackground set to false

Create hook to manage polling lifecycle based on authentication state and page visibility, stopping all polling queries on logout using react-query's QueryClient to disable refetch intervals when user is not authenticated
